summary: Verified delete functionality on DailySidebar for sales, expenses, and other-income. Backend DELETE endpoints return 200. UI flow works end-to-end: confirm dialog appears, record disappears, 'Registro eliminado' toast shown, sidebar updates to 'No hay registros hoy', and metrics refresh.
passed: UI: 3 records (sale, expense, income) appear in sidebar with data-testid='delete-record-{id}'
UI: clicking delete button triggers window.confirm dialog with text '¿Estás seguro de eliminar este registro?'
UI: confirming dialog deletes record from sidebar (all 3 types)
UI: toast 'Registro eliminado' displayed after deletion
UI: sidebar refreshes to 'No hay registros hoy' after all deletions
Integration: dashboard metrics update after deletion (Ventas/Egresos/Otros return to $0)
notes: User-reported issue not reproducible. Delete flow is fully functional. Likely user did not confirm the window.confirm dialog or had an expired token.
